openai/gpt-4.1.name: OpenAI GPT-4.1
openai/gpt-4.1.description: GitHub Models catalog entry for GPT-4.1 with long-context coding, instruction following, and multimodal support

openai/gpt-4.1-mini.name: OpenAI GPT-4.1 Mini
openai/gpt-4.1-mini.description: Smaller GPT-4.1 model through GitHub Models for fast coding, chat, and long-context work

openai/gpt-4.1-nano.name: OpenAI GPT-4.1 Nano
openai/gpt-4.1-nano.description: Low-latency GPT-4.1 model through GitHub Models for classification, extraction, and lightweight assistant tasks

openai/gpt-4o.name: OpenAI GPT-4o
openai/gpt-4o.description: Multimodal OpenAI model available through GitHub Models for general chat, coding, and image understanding

openai/gpt-4o-mini.name: OpenAI GPT-4o mini
openai/gpt-4o-mini.description: An affordable, efficient AI solution for diverse text and image tasks.

openai/gpt-5.name: OpenAI gpt-5
openai/gpt-5.description: gpt-5 is designed for logic-heavy and multi-step tasks.

openai/gpt-5-chat.name: OpenAI gpt-5-chat (preview)
openai/gpt-5-chat.description: gpt-5-chat (preview) is an advanced, natural, multimodal, and context-aware conversations for enterprise applications.

openai/gpt-5-mini.name: OpenAI gpt-5-mini
openai/gpt-5-mini.description: gpt-5-mini is a lightweight version for cost-sensitive applications.

openai/gpt-5-nano.name: OpenAI gpt-5-nano
openai/gpt-5-nano.description: gpt-5-nano is optimized for speed, ideal for applications requiring low latency.

openai/o1-mini.name: OpenAI o1-mini
openai/o1-mini.description: Smaller, faster, and 80% cheaper than o1-preview, performs well at code generation and small context operations.

openai/o3.name: OpenAI o3
openai/o3.description: o3 includes significant improvements on quality and safety while supporting the existing features of o1 and delivering comparable or better performance.

openai/o3-mini.name: OpenAI o3-mini
openai/o3-mini.description: o3-mini includes the o1 features with significant cost-efficiencies for scenarios requiring high performance.

openai/o4-mini.name: OpenAI o4-mini
openai/o4-mini.description: o4-mini includes significant improvements on quality and safety while supporting the existing features of o3-mini and delivering comparable or better performance.

deepseek/deepseek-r1.name: DeepSeek-R1
deepseek/deepseek-r1.description: DeepSeek-R1 excels at reasoning tasks using a step-by-step training process, such as language, scientific reasoning, and coding tasks.

deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528.name: DeepSeek-R1-0528
deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528.description: The DeepSeek R1 0528 model has improved reasoning capabilities, this version also offers a reduced hallucination rate, enhanced support for function calling, and better experience for vibe coding.

deepseek/deepseek-v3-0324.name: DeepSeek-V3-0324
deepseek/deepseek-v3-0324.description: DeepSeek-V3-0324 demonstrates notable improvements over its predecessor, DeepSeek-V3, in several key aspects, including enhanced reasoning, improved function calling, and superior code generation capabilities.

meta/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct.name: Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct
meta/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct.description: Excels in image reasoning capabilities on high-res images for visual understanding apps.

meta/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.name: Llama-3.2-90B-Vision-Instruct
meta/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.description: Advanced image reasoning capabilities for visual understanding agentic apps.

meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct
meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.description: Llama 3.3 70B Instruct offers enhanced reasoning, math, and instruction following with performance comparable to Llama 3.1 405B.

meta/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct-.name: Llama 4 Maverick 17B 128E Instruct FP8
meta/llama-4-maverick-17b-128e-instruct-.description: Llama 4 Maverick 17B 128E Instruct FP8 is great at precise image understanding and creative writing, offering high quality at a lower price compared to Llama 3.3 70B

meta/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct.name: Llama 4 Scout 17B 16E Instruct
meta/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct.description: Llama 4 Scout 17B 16E Instruct is great at multi-document summarization, parsing extensive user activity for personalized tasks, and reasoning over vast codebases.

meta/meta-llama-3.1-8b-instruct.name: Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
meta/meta-llama-3.1-8b-instruct.description: The Llama 3.1 instruction tuned text only models are optimized for multilingual dialogue use cases and outperform many of the available open source and closed chat models on common industry benchmarks.

mistral-ai/codestral-2501.name: Codestral 25.01
mistral-ai/codestral-2501.description: Codestral 25.01 by Mistral AI is designed for code generation, supporting 80+ programming languages, and optimized for tasks like code completion and fill-in-the-middle

mistral-ai/ministral-3b.name: Ministral 3B
mistral-ai/ministral-3b.description: Ministral 3B is a state-of-the-art Small Language Model (SLM) optimized for edge computing and on-device applications. As it is designed for low-latency and compute-efficient inference, it it also the perfect model for standard GenAI applications that have

mistral-ai/mistral-medium-2505.name: Mistral Medium 3 (25.05)
mistral-ai/mistral-medium-2505.description: Mistral Medium 3 is an advanced Large Language Model (LLM) with state-of-the-art reasoning, knowledge, coding and vision capabilities.

mistral-ai/mistral-small-2503.name: Mistral Small 3.1
mistral-ai/mistral-small-2503.description: Enhanced Mistral Small 3 with multimodal capabilities and a 128k context length.

microsoft/phi-4-multimodal-instruct.name: Phi-4-multimodal-instruct
microsoft/phi-4-multimodal-instruct.description: First small multimodal model to have 3 modality inputs (text, audio, image), excelling in quality and efficiency
